title: Selling Ebooks in Nigeria Without PayPal: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, you know firsthand the frustration of trying to sell ebooks without PayPal or Stripe. Your bank can't verify your account, PayPal tells you to wait, and Stripe says you don't meet their requirements. You've tried Gumroad, Payhip, and other platforms, but they all say the same thing: your country is restricted. Meanwhile, your ebook sits idle, waiting for a buyer who can pay. You need a solution that works, and fast. That's why you're here.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's look at what each option actually offers. PayPal and Stripe are popular payment processors, but they have strict requirements and restrictions. Gumroad and Payhip are platforms that allow digital creators to sell their products, but they also have their own set of restrictions. NOWPayments is a crypto-native payment processor that allows for 300+ coins, no KYC, and no buyer account required. Each option has its pros and cons, and it's essential to understand what each one offers before making a decision.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict rules about restricted countries, which include Nigeria. They may require additional verification or even close your account altogether. Gumroad and Payhip also have restrictions, although they may be more lenient. NOWPayments, on the other hand, doesn't have any restrictions, making it a great option for digital creators in Nigeria. By using a crypto-native payment processor, you can bypass these restrictions and start selling your ebook today.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, each option has its own set of rules. PayPal and Stripe charge higher fees and take longer to process payments. Gumroad and Payhip charge lower fees, but may take longer to process payments. NOWPayments charges much lower fees and processes payments instantly. By using a crypto-native payment processor, you can save money and get paid faster.
Don't let restrictions hold you back from selling your ebook – NOWPayments has got you covered.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery are critical for digital creators. PayPal and Stripe require manual verification and delivery, which can slow down the process. Gumroad and Payhip also require manual verification and delivery, but offer some automation features. NOWPayments offers instant automated delivery and payment verification, making it a great option for digital creators who want to streamline their process. With NOWPayments, you can set up your ebook for sale and get paid instantly.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

When choosing an option, consider your situation and what you need. If you're looking for a straightforward solution that works for you, NOWPayments is a great option. If you're looking for a more complex solution that requires manual verification and delivery, Gumroad or Payhip may be a better fit. Either way, it's essential to understand what each option offers and choose the one that best suits your needs.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?
